Lyse Doucet: This is an extraordinary moment Iran has been preparing forThe killing of the supreme leader will be a huge jolt to the Islamic Republic, which will try hard to show it has a plan in place. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c98g91wgdd8o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c98g91wgdd8o#1 Sun, 01 Mar 2026 01:45:52 GMT
Trump's bet on Iranian regime change could be his biggest gamble yetThe US president may be forced to wage a political battle at home while presiding over a new war in the Middle East. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cn48dwm818no?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cn48dwm818no#1 Sun, 01 Mar 2026 02:22:32 GMT
What we know so far: Supreme Leader Khamenei killed, as Iran launches retaliatory strikesIran responds by launching missiles and drones towards Israel and four Gulf Arab countries that host US military bases. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cx2dyz6p3weo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cx2dyz6p3weo#1 Sun, 01 Mar 2026 03:57:42 GMT
Ayatollah Khamenei's iron grip on power in Iran comes to an endIranian state TV confirms the supreme leader has been killed on the first day of massive US and Israeli air strikes on the country. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c3gdnpjvj4ko?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c3gdnpjvj4ko#1 Sun, 01 Mar 2026 01:47:42 GMT

But they have more in common than you might thinkDespite huge political differences, the Green and Reform leaders have much in common, writes Laura Kuenssberg. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cd037p0z1gxo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cd037p0z1gxo#2 Sat, 28 Feb 2026 10:44:57 GMT
